buffer_sizes(3) Library Functions Manual buffer_sizes(3)

NAME

buffer_sizes - Buffer Sizes


- Standard buffer size constants.

SYNOPSIS

Files


file buffer_sizes.h
Common buffer size definitions.

Macros


#define BUFFER_SIZE_SMALL 256
Small buffer size (256 bytes). #define BUFFER_SIZE_MEDIUM 512
Medium buffer size (512 bytes). #define BUFFER_SIZE_LARGE 1024
Large buffer size (1024 bytes). #define BUFFER_SIZE_XLARGE 2048
Extra large buffer size (2048 bytes). #define BUFFER_SIZE_XXLARGE 4096
Extra extra large buffer size (4096 bytes). #define BUFFER_SIZE_XXXLARGE 8192
Extra extra extra large buffer size (8192 bytes). #define BUFFER_SIZE_HUGE 16384
Huge buffer size (16kb). #define BYTES_PER_RGB_PIXEL 3
Bytes per pixel in RGB24 format (red + green + blue). #define IMAGE_FRAME_HEADER_SIZE_LEGACY 8
Legacy image frame header size (width:4 + height:4). #define IMAGE_FRAME_HEADER_SIZE_NEW 16
New image frame header size (width:4 + height:4 + compressed:4 + size:4). #define MAX_FRAME_WIDTH 1920
Maximum reasonable frame width (prevents memory exhaustion). #define MAX_FRAME_HEIGHT 1080
Maximum reasonable frame height (prevents memory exhaustion). #define MAX_FRAME_PIXELS (MAX_FRAME_WIDTH * MAX_FRAME_HEIGHT)
Maximum total frame pixels (width * height). #define MAX_FRAME_RGB_SIZE (MAX_FRAME_PIXELS * BYTES_PER_RGB_PIXEL)
Maximum RGB buffer size (MAX_FRAME_PIXELS * BYTES_PER_RGB_PIXEL). #define MAX_FRAME_BUFFER_SIZE (2 * 1024 * 1024)
Maximum frame buffer size including headers and compression.

Detailed Description

Standard buffer size constants.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define BUFFER_SIZE_HUGE 16384

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Huge buffer size (16kb). Used for huge buffers like stack traces and other system messages.

Definition at line 76 of file buffer_sizes.h.

#define BUFFER_SIZE_LARGE 1024

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Large buffer size (1024 bytes). Used for longer strings, full paths, and larger temporary buffers.

Definition at line 40 of file buffer_sizes.h.

Referenced by check_gpg_key_expiry(), gpg_get_public_key(), gpg_sign_with_key(), gpg_verify_signature_with_binary(), https_get(), parse_keys_from_file(), parse_public_key(), and parse_ssh_private_key().

#define BUFFER_SIZE_MEDIUM 512

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Medium buffer size (512 bytes). Used for medium-length strings, paths, and intermediate buffers.

#define BUFFER_SIZE_SMALL 256

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Small buffer size (256 bytes). Used for short strings, error messages, and small temporary buffers.

Referenced by build_github_gpg_url(), build_gitlab_gpg_url(), client_main(), config_schema_build_from_configs(), disconnect_client_for_bad_data(), fetch_github_gpg_keys(), fetch_github_ssh_keys(), fetch_gitlab_gpg_keys(), fetch_gitlab_ssh_keys(), format_ip_with_port(), gpg_get_public_key(), is_valid_ipv4(), is_valid_ipv6(), options_config_calculate_max_col_width(), options_config_print_options_sections_with_width(), options_config_print_usage(), parse_gpg_keys_from_response(), parse_ip_with_port(), parse_log_level_option(), parse_ssh_private_key(), prompt_password(), prompt_password_simple(), ssh_agent_add_key(), validate_ssh_key_file(), and validate_webcam_index().

#define BUFFER_SIZE_XLARGE 2048

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Extra large buffer size (2048 bytes). Used for very long strings, multiple paths, and large temporary buffers.

Definition at line 49 of file buffer_sizes.h.

Referenced by check_known_host(), check_known_host_no_identity(), gpg_get_public_key(), media_source_create(), remove_known_host(), and stats_logger_thread().

#define BUFFER_SIZE_XXLARGE 4096

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Extra extra large buffer size (4096 bytes). Used for maximum-length paths and very large temporary buffers.

Definition at line 58 of file buffer_sizes.h.

Referenced by parse_ssh_private_key(), ssh_agent_add_key(), and ssh_agent_sign().

#define BUFFER_SIZE_XXXLARGE 8192

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Extra extra extra large buffer size (8192 bytes). Used for extremely large buffers like exception messages and stack traces.

Definition at line 67 of file buffer_sizes.h.

Referenced by gpg_get_public_key(), and ssh_agent_has_key().

#define BYTES_PER_RGB_PIXEL 3

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Bytes per pixel in RGB24 format (red + green + blue).

Definition at line 87 of file buffer_sizes.h.

#define IMAGE_FRAME_HEADER_SIZE_LEGACY 8

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Legacy image frame header size (width:4 + height:4). Used for backward compatibility with older frame format.

Definition at line 96 of file buffer_sizes.h.

#define IMAGE_FRAME_HEADER_SIZE_NEW 16

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

New image frame header size (width:4 + height:4 + compressed:4 + size:4). Used for new compressed frame format with compression flag and data size.

Definition at line 105 of file buffer_sizes.h.

#define MAX_FRAME_BUFFER_SIZE (2 * 1024 * 1024)

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Maximum frame buffer size including headers and compression. Used as a practical limit to prevent memory exhaustion from oversized frames. This is larger than typical compressed frames but smaller than uncompressed RGB.

Definition at line 143 of file buffer_sizes.h.

Referenced by add_client(), add_webrtc_client(), handle_image_frame_packet(), simple_frame_swap_create(), simple_frame_swap_update(), socket_optimize_for_streaming(), and video_frame_buffer_create().

#define MAX_FRAME_HEIGHT 1080

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Maximum reasonable frame height (prevents memory exhaustion).

Definition at line 119 of file buffer_sizes.h.

#define MAX_FRAME_PIXELS (MAX_FRAME_WIDTH * MAX_FRAME_HEIGHT)

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Maximum total frame pixels (width * height).

Definition at line 126 of file buffer_sizes.h.

#define MAX_FRAME_RGB_SIZE (MAX_FRAME_PIXELS * BYTES_PER_RGB_PIXEL)

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Maximum RGB buffer size (MAX_FRAME_PIXELS * BYTES_PER_RGB_PIXEL).

Definition at line 133 of file buffer_sizes.h.

#define MAX_FRAME_WIDTH 1920

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/buffer_sizes.h>

Maximum reasonable frame width (prevents memory exhaustion).
